name: NonfungiblePositionManager
description: Uniswap V3 LP Position Manager (NFT-based) — manages concentrated liquidity positions as ERC-721 tokens

inputs.name: token0
inputs.description: Address of token0 in the pair

inputs.name: token1
inputs.description: Address of token1 in the pair (must be > token0)

inputs.name: fee
inputs.description: Pool fee tier in hundredths of a bip (500 = 0.05%)

inputs.name: tickLower
inputs.description: Lower tick boundary of the position range

inputs.name: tickUpper
inputs.description: Upper tick boundary of the position range

inputs.name: amount0Desired
inputs.description: Desired amount of token0 to deposit

inputs.name: amount1Desired
inputs.description: Desired amount of token1 to deposit

inputs.name: recipient
inputs.description: Address to receive the position NFT

outputs.name: tokenId
outputs.description: NFT token ID of the new position

mint.description: Create a new LP position with a specified tick range and token amounts

inputs.name: amount0Desired
inputs.description: Desired amount of token0 to add

inputs.name: amount1Desired
inputs.description: Desired amount of token1 to add

increaseLiquidity.description: Add liquidity to an existing LP position without changing the tick range

outputs.name: amount0
outputs.description: Token0 amount freed from the position

outputs.name: amount1
outputs.description: Token1 amount freed from the position

decreaseLiquidity.description: Remove liquidity from an LP position. Tokens are not transferred — call collect afterward.

collect.description: Collect accrued trading fees and/or freed liquidity tokens from a position
